series_metadata.series_description: A file for each incarcerated person of inventoried and/or titled property as defined in DRC Policy 61-PRP-01.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for ten (10) years after incarcerated person's final release, maximum expiration, death, definite expiration, etc., then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for ten (10) years after incarcerated person's final release, maximum expiration, death, definite expiration, etc., then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
